metadata.title: PTE-oriented 2000 vocabulary source-checked candidate list
metadata.important_note: This is not an official Pearson PTE 2000 words list. Pearson provides official preparation resources and an Academic Collocation List, but I did not find an official Pearson 2000-word vocabulary list. The last 1233 entries now contain machine-generated Traditional Chinese candidate meanings and still need human review before final study use.
source_strategy: Pearson official PTE resources and Pearson Academic Collocation List for test orientation and academic-collocation direction.
AWL, NAWL, NGSL, Oxford 3000/5000, and Cambridge English Vocabulary Profile as reliable vocabulary frameworks.
wordfreq Zipf frequency and an English dictionary package used locally only for validation/scoring; dictionary definitions were not copied into the output.
